name: Language Patch
description:
This is a translated text patch for non-English languages, which has synchronized the new text and fixed the problem of displaying floor numbers in the game.
Since I am not familiar with the 16 languages except Chinese, I have not translated the relevant languages, but I have organized the relevant text, if necessary, you can further modify the file at the corresponding messages.properties! :) 
PS: The language patch requires a restart of the game to take effect
author: 罐装狐腻
languages: English,Čeština,Deutsch,Ελληνική γλώσσα,Lengua española,Français,Magyar nyelv,Bahasa Indonesia,Italiano,日本語,한국어,Nederlands,Polski,Português,Русский,Türkçe,Українська,Tiếng Việt,中文
